testcase.name: Accessibility Tests › AXE-HOME-01: Homepage has no critical or serious accessibility violations @accessibility

failure.message: homepage has critical/serious accessibility violations. See homepage-axe-violations.json in the report attachments.

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › accessibility.spec.ts:94:7 › Accessibility Tests › AXE-HOME-01: Homepage has no critical or serious accessibility violations @accessibility
Error: homepage has critical/serious accessibility violations. See homepage-axe-violations.json in the report attachments.
expect(received).toEqual(expected) // deep equality
- Expected - 1 + Received + 39
- Array [] + Array [ + Object { + "help": "<html> element must have a lang attribute", + "id": "html-has-lang", + "impact": "serious", + "nodes": 1, + "targets": Array [ + "html", + ], + }, + Object { + "help": "Images must have alternative text", + "id": "image-alt", + "impact": "critical", + "nodes": 1, + "targets": Array [ + ".nivo-main-image", + ], + }, + Object { + "help": "Form elements must have labels", + "id": "label", + "impact": "critical", + "nodes": 2, + "targets": Array [ + "#small-searchterms", + "#newsletter-email", + ], + }, + Object { + "help": "Links must have discernible text", + "id": "link-name", + "impact": "serious", + "nodes": 1, + "targets": Array [ + ".nivo-imageLink:nth-child(1)", + ], + }, + ]
52 | blockingSummary, 53 | `${pageName} has critical/serious accessibility violations. See ${pageName}-axe-violations.json in the report attachments.` > 54 | ).toEqual([]); | ^ 55 | } 56 | 57 | async function addProductToCart(page: Page, searchTerm: string): Promise<void> { at runAccessibilityScan (C:\Users\laksh\OneDrive\Desktop\Playwrite\POM Folder\PLAYWRIGHT-POM-DEMOWEBSHOP\tests\accessibility.spec.ts:54:5) at C:\Users\laksh\OneDrive\Desktop\Playwrite\POM Folder\PLAYWRIGHT-POM-DEMOWEBSHOP\tests\accessibility.spec.ts:96:5
